productName: 420 Mini - Dark Chocolate Sea Salt CBD 1:1
description: Luxurious chocolate made for slow savoring — deep cocoa, soft sweetness, and a cannabis infusion blended into the recipe like a secret ingredient passed down for generations. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. A craveable infused treat that feels right at home next to the best sweets on the shelf.
